prompt: Cria a feature de Timer Pomodoro do Colibri. Preciso do anel de progresso visual, 3 presets (15/25/45), toque pra iniciar/pausar, e uma mensagem de celebração quando completar. Tem que seguir as regras de UX do TDAH — botões grandes, 1 toque, mensagens positivas.
assertions: ProgressRing component uses SVG with stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset for circular animation
Exactly 3 preset buttons for durations (15, 25, 45 minutes) — no slider, no dropdown
Interactive buttons have minimum touch target size (min-h-12 or min-h-touch, at least 48px)
Celebration message on timer completion uses positive, encouraging tone (no guilt/pressure words)
Timer state is persisted to localStorage (duration, remaining, sessionsCompleted)
Start/pause is a single-tap action on the progress ring or a prominent button
